description: Uploads a fixture renamed to smith_anne_dob_1962-04-14_lipid.pdf (PHI-pattern filename) and intentionally corrupts the file so the sidecar extractor errors. Asserts the captured stdout and Langfuse trace metadata contain none of: 'smith', 'anne', '1962-04-14', or any case/punctuation variation thereof.
what_bug_this_catches: If a future logging change reintroduces the original filename into PHP exception messages, FastAPI sidecar logs, CI stdout, or Langfuse trace metadata, this case asserts a PHI-pattern filename (last name + first name + DOB) does not appear in captured stdout or trace metadata when extraction fails on a deliberately corrupt fixture. Implements AgDR-0082 / Phase 3.7.

input.query: Upload corrupted PDF with PHI-pattern filename.

fixture_setup.corrupt_bytes: truncate to 32 bytes so the PDF header is incomplete and the sidecar's lab_pdf extractor raises ValueError
